title: campanula pusilla subsp. notata
intro: Campanula pusilla subsp. notata, also known as dwarf bellflower or small bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanula genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin health. In herbal preparations, Campanula pusilla subsp. notata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in the form of creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
